bspc wm -r: pkill -USR1 -x sxhkd && notify-send "Keyboard daemon has been restarted"
systemctl --user restart pipewire.service pipewire-pulse.socket && notify-send "Pipewire has been restarted" && polybar-msg cmd restart
notify-send "Find Window Class" "$(xprop WM_CLASS | tr -d '\n' | xclip -selection 'clipboard' -f)"
